prompt: Run spring_clean on ~/Documents/graph-dl, then pass its output to rebug for validation. Evaluate the end-to-end pipeline quality.

assertions.text: Rebug produces a verdict for every finding from the spring_clean report
Each verdict in the rebug report cites specific file paths and line numbers from the actual codebase
Rebug identifies at least one finding that is incorrect, over-severitied, or speculative
Rebug confirms the real critical bugs (e.g., wrong torch import, generator concatenation)
Rebug output follows a structured format with clear verdicts per finding
Spring_clean output format is directly consumable by rebug without manual reformatting
Rebug provides new insight beyond what spring_clean reported (e.g., discovers new issues, corrects severity, identifies mitigations)
